creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

How did you get the following information?

CPE_VENDOR=     pcre
CPE_PRODUCT=    perl-compatible_regular_expression_library


I do not see an entry in the dictionary[1] for pcre2 yet.

Also when you view the CVE, the name being used is "pcre:pcre" and "pcre:pcre2"

But since there is nothing definitively in the dictionary yet for pcre2 we can't be sure what they will officially go with.


[1] http://static.nvd.nist.gov/feeds/xml/cpe/dictionary/official-cpe-dictionary_v2.3.xml.gz
[2] https://web.nvd.nist.gov/view/vuln/detail?vulnId=CVE-2016-3191
